Collocation: grab a bag;grab the chance;grab hold of
Example_EN: She grabbed her bag and ran for the bus.
Example_CN: 她抓起包就冲向公交车。

Collocation: be entitled to;entitle someone to;book entitled
Example_EN: Staff are entitled to twenty days of paid leave.
Example_CN: 员工有权享有二十天带薪假。

Example_EN: Could you lend me your dictionary for an hour?
Example_CN: 能把字典借我用一小时吗？

Example_EN: Parental involvement improves children's reading.
Example_CN: 家长参与能提高孩子阅读能力。

Example_EN: Too much sun exposure can damage your skin.
Example_CN: 过多日晒会损伤皮肤。

Example_EN: She prefers conventional methods to high-tech ones.
Example_CN: 她更喜欢传统方法而非高科技方案。

Example_EN: Digital technology has changed how we shop.
Example_CN: 数字技术改变了我们的购物方式。

Example_EN: Please translate this letter into Chinese.
Example_CN: 请把这封信译成中文。

Example_EN: Please edit your essay carefully before submitting.
Example_CN: 提交前请仔细编辑作文。

Example_EN: The rock formation attracts thousands of visitors.
Example_CN: 这处岩层吸引成千上万游客。

Example_EN: You need to pay a deposit to reserve the room.
Example_CN: 预订房间需支付押金。

Example_EN: We had a pleasant conversation over coffee.
Example_CN: 我们一边喝咖啡一边愉快地交谈。

Example_EN: She plans to study overseas next year.
Example_CN: 她计划明年出国留学。

Example_EN: Doctors advocate for more outdoor exercise.
Example_CN: 医生倡导增加户外运动。

Example_EN: The establishment of the new hospital took two years.
Example_CN: 新医院的建立花了两年。

Example_EN: Please write a brief summary of the chapter.
Example_CN: 请写一章内容的简短摘要。

Example_EN: The sea was too rough for small boats.
Example_CN: 海面太汹涌，小船不宜出海。

Example_EN: Do you have a spare pen I can borrow?
Example_CN: 有多余的笔可以借我吗？

Example_EN: The patient made a full recovery after surgery.
Example_CN: 病人手术后完全康复。

Collocation: official seal;seal the envelope;break the seal
Example_EN: Please seal the envelope before posting it.
Example_CN: 寄出前请封好信封。

Example_EN: Take the Tube to the city centre.
Example_CN: 乘地铁去市中心。

Example_EN: The clock tower can be seen from miles away.
Example_CN: 数英里外都能看见那座钟楼。

Example_EN: Honesty should characterize a good leader.
Example_CN: 诚实应是优秀领导者的特征。
MemoryTip: character → characterize：标出特性（美式拼写）。

Collocation: specify a date;specify the size;clearly specify
Example_EN: Please specify the colour and size you need.
Example_CN: 请注明你需要的颜色和尺码。

Example_EN: What is the exact time of the next train?
Example_CN: 下一班火车的确切时间是几点？

Collocation: spin around;spin a wheel;put a spin on
Example_EN: The dancer spun around on one foot.
Example_CN: 舞者单脚旋转。

Example_EN: Call the operator if you cannot connect the number.
Example_CN: 若拨不通号码请找话务员。

Example_EN: The nurse checked the newborn infant carefully.
Example_CN: 护士仔细检查了新生儿。

Example_EN: Children dug a small hole in the sand.
Example_CN: 孩子们在沙子里挖了个小坑。

Example_EN: He dragged the heavy suitcase up the stairs.
Example_CN: 他把沉重行李箱拖上楼梯。

Example_EN: She learned to mount a horse at riding school.
Example_CN: 她在骑术学校学会了上马。

Example_EN: Please wrap the gift in colourful paper.
Example_CN: 请用彩纸把礼物包好。

Example_EN: We anticipate heavy traffic during the holiday.
Example_CN: 我们预计假日交通会拥堵。

Example_EN: Young children are dependent on their parents.
Example_CN: 年幼孩子依赖父母。

Example_EN: This clinic specializes in sports injuries.
Example_CN: 这家诊所专治运动损伤。

Example_EN: Look at the picture from a different angle.
Example_CN: 换个角度看这幅画。

Example_EN: We ordered roast chicken for dinner.
Example_CN: 我们晚餐点了烤鸡。

Example_EN: Deep breathing can reduce anxiety before exams.
Example_CN: 深呼吸可减轻考前焦虑。

Example_EN: Update the software to block computer viruses.
Example_CN: 更新软件以防电脑病毒。
MemoryTip: virus：致病微生物或恶意程序。

Example_EN: The train arrived precisely at nine o'clock.
Example_CN: 火车九点整到达。

Example_EN: Their main rival launched a similar product.
Example_CN: 主要对手推出了类似产品。

Example_EN: Do not take offense if she seems quiet.
Example_CN: 如果她显得安静，请不要见怪。
MemoryTip: lemma 为美式 offense；英式常写 offence。

Collocation: detect a problem;detect smoke;hard to detect
Example_EN: Sensors can detect smoke within seconds.
Example_CN: 传感器可在数秒内探测到烟雾。

Example_EN: Many teenagers spend long hours on social media.
Example_CN: 许多青少年长时间玩社交媒体。

Example_EN: I admire her courage in difficult times.
Example_CN: 我钦佩她在困境中的勇气。

Example_EN: Moderate exercise is better than no exercise.
Example_CN: 适度运动好过完全不运动。

Example_EN: He will undergo heart surgery next week.
Example_CN: 他下周将接受心脏手术。

Example_EN: She became a professional musician after college.
Example_CN: 大学毕业后她成为职业音乐家。

Example_EN: The discovery is of great scientific significance.
Example_CN: 这一发现具有重大科学意义。

Example_EN: I take a quick shower every morning.
Example_CN: 我每天早上快速冲个澡。

Example_EN: Illegal parking can lead to a fine.
Example_CN: 违章停车可能导致罚款。

Collocation: charity work;raise money for charity;charity shop
Example_EN: They raise money for charity every December.
Example_CN: 他们每年十二月为慈善筹款。

Example_EN: Access to clean water should be a universal right.
Example_CN: 获得清洁水应是普遍权利。

Collocation: light a cigarette;cigarette smoke;pack of cigarettes
Example_EN: Cigarette smoke is harmful to everyone nearby.
Example_CN: 香烟烟雾对周围所有人都有害。

Collocation: constitute a crime;constitute a majority;constitute a team
Example_EN: These three countries constitute a small trade group.
Example_CN: 这三个国家构成一个小型贸易集团。

Example_EN: Make sure you have adequate food for the trip.
Example_CN: 确保旅途有足够食物。

Example_EN: The firm hired a management consultant last month.
Example_CN: 公司上月聘请了一位管理顾问。

Example_EN: A leading historian wrote a new book on the war.
Example_CN: 一位权威历史学家写了一部关于战争的新书。

Example_EN: My cousin is coming to stay for the weekend.
Example_CN: 我表亲这个周末要来住。

Example_EN: Teachers use visual aids to explain difficult ideas.
Example_CN: 教师用直观教具解释难懂概念。

Example_EN: Forgetting the key was a stupid mistake.
Example_CN: 忘带钥匙是个愚蠢的错误。

Example_EN: She is keen on learning Spanish this year.
Example_CN: 她今年热衷于学西班牙语。

Example_EN: The city is home to many ethnic groups.
Example_CN: 这座城市居住着许多族群。

Example_EN: She has an identical twin who lives abroad.
Example_CN: 她有一个住在国外的同卵双胞胎。

Example_EN: The new drug will enter clinical trials next year.
Example_CN: 新药明年将进入临床试验。

Example_EN: Typhoons often hit the eastern coast in summer.
Example_CN: 台风常在夏天袭击东海岸。

Example_EN: According to the weather forecast, it will snow tonight.
Example_CN: 据天气预报，今晚会下雪。

Example_EN: This news segment lasted only three minutes.
Example_CN: 这则新闻片段仅持续三分钟。

Example_EN: It is a local custom to remove shoes indoors.
Example_CN: 进屋脱鞋是当地习俗。

Example_EN: Animals must adapt to changes in their habitat.
Example_CN: 动物必须适应栖息地的变化。

Example_EN: Children build sand castles on the beach.
Example_CN: 孩子们在海滩上堆沙堡。

Collocation: baseball cap;cap on spending;put a cap on
Example_EN: He wore a baseball cap to keep the sun off.
Example_CN: 他戴棒球帽遮阳。

Example_EN: Thank you for your prompt reply to my email.
Example_CN: 感谢你及时回复我的邮件。

Example_EN: Her personal charm made everyone feel welcome.
Example_CN: 她的个人魅力让每个人都感到受欢迎。

Example_EN: How did the market react to the news?
Example_CN: 市场对该消息作何反应？

Collocation: give a lecture;attend a lecture;lecture on
Example_EN: I attended a lecture on climate change last night.
Example_CN: 我昨晚听了气候变化讲座。

Example_EN: They started a small business venture last year.
Example_CN: 他们去年创办了一家小型企业。

Example_EN: Water is a chemical compound of hydrogen and oxygen.
Example_CN: 水是氢与氧的化合物。

Collocation: rescue workers;come to the rescue;rescue from
Example_EN: Rescue workers pulled the driver from the car.
Example_CN: 救援人员把司机从车里拉了出来。

Collocation: make a mess;in a mess;clean up the mess
Example_EN: Please clean up the mess in the kitchen.
Example_CN: 请清理厨房的一片狼藉。

Collocation: strong preference;preference for;in order of preference
Example_EN: She has a strong preference for tea over coffee.
Example_CN: 她明显更喜欢茶而不是咖啡。

Example_EN: The report offers a comprehensive study of local housing.
Example_CN: 报告对当地住房做了全面研究。

Example_EN: Higher pay can be an incentive to work harder.
Example_CN: 更高薪酬可激励人更努力工作。

Collocation: football league;in a different league;top of the league
Example_EN: Their team finished top of the league last season.
Example_CN: 他们球队上赛季联赛排名第一。

Example_EN: The two leaders began a constructive dialog.
Example_CN: 两位领导人开始了建设性对话。
MemoryTip: lemma 为 dialog；英式常写 dialogue。

Example_EN: Would you like cream in your coffee?
Example_CN: 咖啡里要加点奶油吗？

Example_EN: The city experienced rapid growth in the last decade.
Example_CN: 过去十年这座城市增长迅速。

Collocation: cancel a flight;cancel a meeting;cancel plans
Example_EN: They had to cancel the outdoor concert because of rain.
Example_CN: 因雨他们不得不取消户外音乐会。

Example_EN: I deeply regret not studying harder last year.
Example_CN: 我深刻后悔去年没有更努力学习。

Collocation: dismiss an idea;dismiss from;dismiss the class
Example_EN: Managers should not dismiss employee concerns too quickly.
Example_CN: 管理者不应过快忽视员工关切。

Example_EN: Leave a wider margin on the left of the page.
Example_CN: 请在页面左侧留更宽页边。

Example_EN: A secret room lay beneath the old house.
Example_CN: 旧房子下面有一间密室。

Example_EN: She faced a strong opponent in the final.
Example_CN: 她在决赛中面对强大对手。

Example_EN: It is hard to resist chocolate after dinner.
Example_CN: 饭后很难抵挡巧克力的诱惑。

Example_EN: The new software has greater technical capability.
Example_CN: 新软件技术能力更强。

Example_EN: There was absolute silence in the exam hall.
Example_CN: 考场里一片绝对寂静。

Example_EN: Her story corresponds closely to the police report.
Example_CN: 她的说法与警方报告高度一致。

Collocation: suffer a stroke;swimming stroke;stroke a cat
Example_EN: He suffered a stroke and spent weeks in hospital.
Example_CN: 他中风后住院数周。
MemoryTip: stroke：一次击打，也指脑血管意外。

Example_EN: Few students dare to ask questions in large lectures.
Example_CN: 大课上很少有学生敢提问。

Example_EN: A language barrier made communication difficult.
Example_CN: 语言障碍使沟通变得困难。
